title: hyoseris lucida subsp. frutescens
intro: Hyoseris lucida subsp. frutescens is a subspecies of the Hyoseris lucida plant, commonly known as a type of dandelion or chicory, and is a perennial plant native to Europe. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hyoseris lucida subsp. frutescens include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Hyoseris lucida subsp. frutescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or inflorescence extract, and is often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
